# Khipu.Net

> Khipu.Net is a .NET 10 library for SUNAT Peru Electronic Invoicing (Facturacion Electronica). It is a 100% compatible reimplementation of the Greenter PHP library. It provides document models, tax calculation, XML UBL 2.1 generation, XMLDSig signing, SOAP client for SUNAT, and document validation.

Install: `dotnet add package Khipu.Net`

Target framework: net10.0

## Getting Started

- [Getting Started](https://github.com/lleontor705/Khipu.Net/blob/master/docs/getting-started.md): Installation, prerequisites, company configuration, SUNAT environments

## Invoices and Receipts

- [Invoices and Receipts](https://github.com/lleontor705/Khipu.Net/blob/master/docs/invoices.md): Creating invoices and receipts using Factory and Builder patterns, tax types, series format, payment terms, detractions, perceptions

## Credit and Debit Notes

- [Credit and Debit Notes](https://github.com/lleontor705/Khipu.Net/blob/master/docs/credit-debit-notes.md): Creating credit and debit notes referencing original documents, reason codes (Catalogo 09 and 10)

## Summaries and Voided Documents

- [Summaries and Voided](https://github.com/lleontor705/Khipu.Net/blob/master/docs/summaries.md): Daily receipt summaries, voided documents, async processing, CDR polling

## Tax Calculator

- [Tax Calculator](https://github.com/lleontor705/Khipu.Net/blob/master/docs/tax-calculator.md): IGV calculation, sale price, unit value, detractions, SUNAT rounding, amount in words

## Signing and Sending

- [Signing and Sending](https://github.com/lleontor705/Khipu.Net/blob/master/docs/signing-and-sending.md): X.509 certificates, XmlSigner, SunatService, SOAP client, document numbering

## Validation

- [Validation](https://github.com/lleontor705/Khipu.Net/blob/master/docs/validation.md): DocumentValidationEngine, RUC/DNI validation, field validators, error codes

## API Reference

- [API Reference](https://github.com/lleontor705/Khipu.Net/blob/master/docs/api-reference.md): Complete reference for all public classes, methods, and types across all namespaces

## Optional

- [Parity Baseline Governance](https://github.com/lleontor705/Khipu.Net/blob/master/docs/parity-baseline-governance.md): Internal testing governance for Greenter compatibility
- [README](https://github.com/lleontor705/Khipu.Net/blob/master/README.md): Project overview and feature list
